GameConditionDef.label: parasitic rage
GameConditionDef.description: Parasites within the local area have become engraged. During this time, parasite raids may occur, and all parasites will be somewhat stronger.
GameConditionDef.letterText: All parasites within the local area have become enraged. For as long as this lasts, parasites within the area will have increased speed.
GameConditionDef.endMessage: Local parasites are no longer enraged.
